name: Unnamed Project

entity_types.name: Researcher
entity_types.description: Academic or industry researcher working on AI, GraphRAG, or related technologies

attributes.description: Geographic location or country of the university

attributes.name: specialization

examples: The Chinese University of Hong Kong, Shenzhen

attributes.description: Main products or services related to AI or GraphRAG

attributes.description: Target audience or readership focus

attributes.name: jurisdiction
attributes.description: Geographic or administrative scope of authority

attributes.name: policy_focus
attributes.description: Key policy areas related to AI or technology

entity_types.description: School or training organization teaching GraphRAG or AI concepts

attributes.description: Level of education, e.g., K-12, vocational, corporate training

attributes.name: curriculum_focus
attributes.description: Subjects or courses offered related to AI

entity_types.description: Any individual not fitting the specific person types above, e.g., general public, casual users

attributes.description: Full name of the individual

attributes.name: background
attributes.description: General background or interests

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: Any organization not fitting the specific organization types above, e.g., small groups, informal ...

attributes.name: org_name
attributes.description: Name of the organization

attributes.name: purpose
attributes.description: General purpose or activities of the organization

edge_types.name: WORKS_FOR
edge_types.description: Employment or affiliation relationship between a person and an organization

edge_types.name: COLLABORATES_WITH
edge_types.description: Cooperation on projects or research between entities

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Media coverage or analysis of entities or topics

edge_types.name: DEVELOPS
edge_types.description: Creation or implementation of technology, tools, or systems

edge_types.name: RESEARCHES
edge_types.description: Conducting studies or investigations on specific topics

edge_types.name: APPLIES
edge_types.description: Using technology or methods in practical domains

edge_types.name: REGULATES
edge_types.description: Oversight or control by government bodies over organizations or activities

edge_types.name: EDUCATES
edge_types.description: Teaching or training provided by institutions to individuals or groups

edge_types.name: COMMENTS_ON
edge_types.description: Public expression of opinions or feedback on entities or topics

analysis_summary: 文本内容聚焦于GraphRAG技术的发展、研究、应用和媒体报道，涉及学术研究、企业开发、媒体传播和教育培训等多个领域。基于社交媒体舆论模拟的需求，实体类型设计涵盖了研究人员、高校、科技公司、媒体机构、开发者、行业专家、政府机构、教育机构等具体角色，并包含Person和Organization作为兜底类型，以覆盖文本中提及的各类个人和组织主体。关系类型反映了这些实体在社媒互动中的合作、报道、开发、研究、应用、监管、教育和评论等真实联系。
simulation_requirement: 未来GraphRAG的发展趋势是什么？有什么领域可以被快速推进的？
